protocol.name: Atlas MVML Discovery Protocol v1.0

terminology.MVC: Minimum Viable Combination — an irreducible behavioural structure observed in the Atlas MNQ dataset
terminology.Candidate_Market_Law: A MVC that has survived all internal validation tests and is being tracked for cross-instrument replication
terminology.Market_Law: Aspirational label — requires replication across multiple instruments and independent time periods

acceptance_criteria.irreducibility: Removing any component must reduce WR by >= 5pp or PF below 1.5
acceptance_criteria.simplicity: No simpler formulation achieves equivalent performance
acceptance_criteria.economic_mechanism: Must have a plausible institutional or structural explanation

rejection_criteria: Can be simplified to fewer variables without performance loss
Relies on proxy variables (fails causal independence test)

search_strategy.pre_filter: Activation rate 2-15% of RTH bars (to ensure adequate N)
search_strategy.full_validation: Applied to all candidates passing initial screen

ml001.name: Participation-Amplified Directional Momentum
ml001.behaviour: When institutional participation surges (D-01) during a session where the overnight range was large (D-03) and directionally bullish (D-02_bull), the probability of a sustained AM directional move is significantly elevated.
ml001.economic_mechanism: Large bullish overnight ranges indicate institutional positioning. When the subsequent AM session opens with elevated participation (order fragmentation), it signals institutional continuation rather than reversal. The three conditions together identify the rare confluence of institutional intent + institutional execution + market structure alignment.

irreducibility_evidence.remove_D02: PF drops from 2.536 to 0.939 (D01×D03 only — below 1.0)

ml001.notes: Terminology: This is a Candidate MVC within the Atlas MNQ research framework. The label "Market Law" is aspirational and requires cross-instrument replication before it can be claimed.
